scenarios.name: OWASP Juice Shop
scenarios.description: Modern intentionally insecure web application with 100+ challenges covering injection, XSS, broken authentication and more.

challenges.name: Find the Score Board
challenges.hint: Try exploring the application's client-side JavaScript or route definitions.

challenges.name: SQL Injection Login
challenges.hint: What happens if you enter a SQL fragment like ' OR 1=1-- in the email field?

challenges.name: Perform a DOM XSS Attack
challenges.hint: Look for a search field that reflects user input without sanitisation.

challenges.name: Access the Admin Section
challenges.hint: Once you bypass login, explore the navigation for hidden admin routes.

challenges.name: Post Feedback as Another User
challenges.hint: Intercept the feedback POST request and modify the userId field.

challenges.name: Find the Exposed Metrics Endpoint
challenges.hint: Many Node.js apps expose a /metrics endpoint for Prometheus. Try common paths.

scenarios.name: Damn Vulnerable Web App
scenarios.description: Classic vulnerable PHP application for learning web security fundamentals including SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, and command injection.

challenges.name: Brute Force Login
challenges.hint: Use a tool like Hydra or Burp Intruder with a common password list.

challenges.name: SQL Injection (Low)
challenges.hint: Enter 1' OR '1'='1 into the User ID field and observe the result.

challenges.name: Reflected XSS (Low)
challenges.hint: The 'What's your name?' input echoes directly into the page. Try injecting a <script> tag.

challenges.name: Command Injection (Low)
challenges.hint: The ping utility doesn't sanitize input. Try appending ; ls or && cat /etc/passwd.

challenges.name: Local File Inclusion
challenges.hint: Notice the page parameter in the URL. Can you traverse directories with ../../?

challenges.name: CSRF Password Change
challenges.hint: Craft an HTML page that auto-submits the password change form to DVWA.
